summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bookvia Administrator System Phase 2. All backend API tests passed (10/10, 1 skipped). All frontend UI tests passed. The administrator login flow, dashboard restrictions, and permission-based UI controls are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/business/managers with valid email returns managers list - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/auth/business/managers with non-existent email returns empty list - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/auth/business/managers without email param handles gracefully - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/manager-login with correct credentials returns token + business + manager - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/manager-login with wrong PIN returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/manager-login with non-existent business returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/manager-login with non-existent worker returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/manager-login returns correct permissions - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/login (owner) works correctly - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/login with wrong password returns 401 - PASSED
Frontend Login: 'Negocio' tab shows sub-toggle 'Soy el dueño' | 'Soy administrador' - PASSED
Frontend Login: 'Soy administrador' shows email field and 'Buscar mi cuenta' button - PASSED
Frontend Login: Email testrealstripe@bookvia.com + 'Buscar mi cuenta' shows dropdown with 'Test Worker Duration' - PASSED
Frontend Login: Selecting administrator shows PIN input field - PASSED
Frontend Login: PIN 1234 + 'Ingresar' navigates to /business/dashboard - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): Yellow banner 'Sesión de administrador: Test Worker Duration' visible - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): Only 'Agenda' tab visible (Servicios, Equipo, Cierres, Fotos, Suscripcion hidden) - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): 'Config' (Settings) button NOT visible - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): Revenue and Total stats cards NOT visible (view_reports=false) - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): 'Reagendar' button visible on bookings (reschedule_bookings=true) - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): 'Cancelar' button NOT visible on bookings (cancel_bookings=false) - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): Click on client name opens detail with email/phone (view_client_data=true) - PASSED
Frontend Login (owner): 'Soy el dueño' + email/password works normally - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): ALL tabs visible (Agenda, Servicios, Equipo, Cierres, Fotos, Suscripcion) - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): ALL stats cards visible (including revenue and total) - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): 'Config' button visible - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): Manager session banner NOT present - PASSED
Frontend Team tab (owner): 'Administrador' text appears (not 'Gerente') - PASSED
Frontend Team tab (owner): Manager badge shows 'Administrador' - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Manager login endpoint correctly validates business email, worker_id, and PIN
Token creation includes worker_id and is_manager flag for manager sessions
Frontend auth context correctly exposes isManager, managerPermissions, and hasPermission()
Dashboard tabs are dynamically filtered based on permissions using visibleTabs.filter()
Stats cards correctly hidden when view_reports=false
Booking action buttons correctly show/hide based on complete_bookings, reschedule_bookings, cancel_bookings permissions
Client detail modal respects view_client_data permission
'Gerente' successfully renamed to 'Administrador' throughout the UI
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test worker 'Test Worker Duration' with PIN 1234
context_for_next_testing_agent: Administrator System Phase 2 is fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Login page has sub-toggle 'Soy el dueño' | 'Soy administrador' under Negocio tab, (2) Administrator login uses business email + worker dropdown + PIN, (3) Dashboard shows yellow banner for admin sessions, (4) Tabs and buttons are dynamically shown/hidden based on permissions, (5) 'Gerente' renamed to 'Administrador' throughout UI. All API endpoints work: /api/auth/business/managers (GET), /api/auth/business/manager-login (POST).
